channel.description: AmandaXO - Afrobeats production tutorials, beat breakdowns, and Ableton Live mixing sessions out of Greensboro NC. Plus security conference recaps and small-business pentesting notes from my work at Ironclad Security Consulting. Arsenal til I die.
